All seven previously identified Bay Baby report types are present in the downloaded sample set.

Use this checklist to evaluate operator safety prior to equipment use. / Utilice esta lista de verificación para evaluar la seguridad del operador antes de usar el equipo.
sample_fields.answer: Operator Being Evaluated / Operador en evaluación: Limber garcia

sample_fields.question: Did the operator follow the daily checklist and inspect the equipment prior to use? / ¿El operador siguió la lista de verificación diaria e inspeccionó el equipo antes de usarlo?
Did the operator fasten their seatbelt properly prior to usage? / ¿El operador se abrochó el cinturón de seguridad correctamente antes de usarlo?
Properly started and stopped the engine / Arrancó y paró correctamente el motor.
Properly used brakes while operating equipment / Frenos usados correctamente mientras se opera el equipo
Properly set the parking brake / Ponga correctamente el freno de mano
Demonstrated proper use of clutch and shifting / Uso adecuado demostrado del embrague y los cambios
Demonstrated safe driving on level ground or slight grade / Conducción segura demostrada en terreno nivelado o pendiente leve
Operating at a safe speed / Operando a una velocidad segura
Demonstrated safe procedures for lowering or blocking out implements / Procedimientos seguros demostrados para bajar o bloquear implementos
Properly hitched implement to tractor / Implemento debidamente enganchado al tractor
Properly attached/detached hydraulic lines on implement / Properly attached/detached hydraulic lines on implement
Properly operated and shut down PTO / Operado y apagado correctamente PTO

Creator:

Are all attachments or attachment points secure and in good working condition? / ¿Están todos los accesorios o puntos de sujeción seguros y en buenas condiciones de funcionamiento?
Is the seatbelt functional? / ¿Funciona el cinturón de seguridad?
Does the equipment have a fire extinguisher? / ¿Tiene el equipo un extintor de incendios?
Is the equipment in clean condition? (dirt, debris, etc.) / ¿Está el equipo limpio? (suciedad, escombros, etc.)
Does the equipment have adequate fuel? / ¿El equipo tiene combustible adecuado?
Are all lights operational?(headlights, reverse, hazards, turn signals, brake) / ¿Están todas las luces en funcionamiento? (Faros, marcha atrás, peligros, señales de giro, freno)
Does the horn work? / ¿Funciona la bocina?
Do the brakes work properly? (foot and park) / ¿Funcionan correctamente los frenos? (freno y freno de mano)
Do you have all necessary equipment for road travel, if necessary? / ¿Tiene todo el equipo necesario para viajar por carretera, si es necesario?

sample_fields.question: Drop off / Dejar
Bee species observed / Especies de abejas observadas
Number of bees observed / Cantidad de abejas observadas
Activity Patterns / Patrones de actividad
Pesticide exposure / exposición a pesticidas
Employee name of who reported these checks?
Manager W Admin Reported By / Reportado Por
Report ID:
Date & Time:
Creator:
Location:
Coordinates:
Why are you conducting this risk assessment? / ¿Por qué está realizando esta evaluación de riesgos?
Planned Use / Uso planificado
Was the growing area used for growing food crops last season? / ¿Se utilizó el área de cultivo para cultivos alimentarios la temporada pasada?
What food crops were produced in the last season? / ¿Qué cultivos alimentarios se produjeron en la última temporada?
Has the growing area been used for any non-agricultural purposes? / ¿Se ha utilizado el área de cultivo para fines no agrícolas?

Has flooding from uncontrolled causes occurred on the growing area since the previous growth cycle? / ¿Se han producido inundaciones por causas no controladas en el área de cultivo desde el ciclo de cultivo anterior?
In the previous 60 days have any soil amendments or pesticides been applied to the growing area? / En los 60 días anteriores, ¿se han aplicado enmiendas al suelo o pesticidas en el área de cultivo?
What is the intended primary water source for irrigation use? / ¿Cuál es la fuente primaria de agua prevista para uso de riego?
Is municipal or district water used in the growing operation? / ¿Se utiliza agua municipal o distrital en la operación de cultivo?
Is well water used in the operation? / ¿Se utiliza agua de pozo en la operación?
Is open flowing surface water used in the operation (e.g., rivers, canals, ditches, etc.)? / ¿Se utiliza agua superficial de flujo abierto en la operación (p. ej., ríos, canales, zanjas, etc.)?

Is non-flowing surface water (e.g., ponds, reservoirs, watersheds, etc.) used in the operation? / ¿Se utiliza agua superficial que no fluye (p. ej., estanques, embalses, cuencas hidrográficas, etc.) en la operación?
Are there backflow prevention devices on all main lines? / ¿Hay dispositivos de prevención de reflujo en todas las líneas principales?

If the operation stores water (tank, cistern, container), is the storage container well maintained? / Si la operación almacena agua (tanque, cisterna, contenedor), ¿se mantiene bien el contenedor de almacenamiento?
Is there above ground access to the water source? / ¿Hay acceso por encima del suelo a la fuente de agua?
Does the water source and associated equipment appear to be damage and tamper free? / ¿La fuente de agua y el equipo asociado parecen estar dañados y libres de manipulaciones?
Is the water access (well head, pump house, etc.) covered and protected? / ¿Está cubierto y protegido el acceso al agua (boca del pozo, casa de bombas, etc.)?

If the overall condition is not good, please provide additional detail and attach a photo of the issue / Si el estado general no es bueno, proporcione detalles adicionales y adjunte una foto del problema
Is there evidence of human fecal matter in the adjacent land to the audited area? / ¿Hay evidencia de materia fecal humana en el terreno adyacente al área auditada?
Have soil tests been ordered/conducted to test for metals or other regulated contaminants? / ¿Se han ordenado/ realizado pruebas de suelo para detectar metales u otros contaminantes regulados?

Have you conducted a generic E. coli test on the water (taken from the closest practical point of use)? / ¿Ha realizado una prueba genérica de E. coli en el agua (tomada del punto práctico de uso más cercano)?
Employee name of who reported these checks?

sample_fields.question: Employee name of who reported these checks?
Manager W Admin Reported By / Reportado Por
Report ID:
Date & Time:
Creator:
Coordinates:
Are all employee bulletin boards up to date and compliant? (Federal, State, WISHA, L&I, etc.)
Are the minutes of the most recent FH&S Committee meeting posted for staff review?
Are all Emergency Contact numbers posted and accessible to employees?
Are employee training records properly maintained and available for review?
Are trainings occurring at the scheduled monthly frequency?
Are all employees properly trained in the selection, use and maintenance of PPE?
Is there a posted floor plan and procedure for evacuations and other emergency situations?
Are all Emergency Exits clearly marked and identifiable?
Are all fire alarms clearly marked and readily accessible?
Are all fire extinguishers clearly marked and readily accessible?
Is there evidence of regular inspection and maintenance of all fire extinguishers?
Do all sprinkler heads have, at a minimum, an 18" clearance within the facility?
Are all First Aid Kits clearly marked , readily accessible and adequately stocked?
Is the AED properly charged and appear functional? (green light indicates charge)
Are all top-heavy items properly bolted or secured to withstand an earthquake?
Are all large and/or heavy equipment items stored on lower level shelves to prevent injury in the event of an earthquake?
Are all walkways and stairways adequately illuminated?
Are all stairway treads and hand rails in good working condition?
Are all walkway markings throughout the facility in good condition?
Are all walkways unobstructed, clear of equipment and free of slip/trip hazards?
Are all hand and power tools properly stored in employee tool carts and put away when not in use?
Are employees trained on safe lifting techniques and observed using that training in the workplace?
Are high forklift traffic areas free of damage which may indicate operator error?
Are all employee common areas (breakrooms, restrooms, etc.) clean and free from litter?
Are all common appliances (refrigerator, microwave, etc.) clean and in good working condition?
Are sufficient personal hygiene supplies available? (Hand soap, single use towels, toilet tissue, etc.)
Is there a proper 36" clearance surrounding all electrical panels?
Is all electrical equipment clean and in good working order?
Is all inspected equipment properly grounded and kept clear of combustible materials?
Are all extension cords and outlet strips plugged directly into outlets? (i.e. no "piggy-backing")
Are all observed cords in good working condition and free of splices, breaks and/or pinches?
Are there cover plates on all electrical outlets?
Are all electrical outlets in restrooms GFCI protected?
Has there been a recent inventory of all hazardous materials stored on site? (i.e. within the last two calendar months)
Are all Material Safety Data Sheets up to date and available for employee review?
Are all secondary containers properly labeled following SOPs?
Are all storage areas properly organized and uncluttered?
Are all cabinets and lockers used to store hazardous materials locked and/or latched when not in use?
Is there proper ventilation in all areas where chemicals and/ or solvents are observed in use?
Are employees handling hazardous chemicals properly trained and observed following all safety protocols?
Are all maintenance and equipment storage areas clean and free of clutter or debris?
Is adequate hearing protection provided and are employees trained in the proper use while operating tools and/or machinery?
Is adequate eye protection provided with clear vision and no scratching and/or pitting and are employees trained in the proper use while operating tools and/or machinery?
Are employees observed properly using PPE while engaged in work activities?
Are all equipment operational guards in place and fully functional?
Are all wires and cords observed intact? (i.e. free of cuts, breaks or splices?)
Are employees trained in and following proper LOTO procedure?
Are all required safety placards in place and legible?
Is there proper ventilation where tools and/or machinery are in use or undergoing maintenance?
Employee name of who reported these checks?
Manager W Admin Reported By / Reportado Por

Date & Time:
Creator:
Location:
Coordinates:

Date of corrective action / Fecha de la acción correctiva
Describe immediate corrective action / Describir la acción correctiva inmediata
Identify the root cause of the non-conformance / Identificar la causa raíz de la no conformidad
Corrective and preventative actions taken / Acciones correctivas y preventivas tomadas

reports.report_type: R007 Line Lead - End of Day
reports.creator: Lead Lider

sample_fields.question: Report ID:
Date & Time:
Creator:
Location:
Coordinates:
Tag all Completed Pallets / ¿Están todas las órdenes de trabajo y hojas de producción completadas y entregadas correctamente?
Continuously put away unused UPC's, dirty rags, and products not needed / Guardar continuamente los UPC no utilizados, trapos sucios y productos innecesarios
Report all accidents, injuries and near misses that occurred on your line / Informar de todos los accidentes, lesiones y casi accidentes que ocurrieron en su línea
Report all maintenance issues on your line immediately. / Informe de todos los problemas de mantenimiento en su línea de inmediato.

Continuously wipe mispainted pumpkins when machines are down or product is being switched / Limpiar continuamente las calabazas mal pintadas cuando las máquinas estén detenidas o se esté cambiando el producto.
Continuously stock hats and hair for Line 1 / Abastecer continuamente sombreros y cabello para la Línea 1
Tag all Completed Pallets / ¿Están todas las órdenes de trabajo y hojas de producción completadas y entregadas correctamente?
Continuously put away unused UPC's, dirty rags, and products not needed / Guardar continuamente los UPC no utilizados, trapos sucios y productos innecesarios
Report all accidents, injuries and near misses that occurred on your line / Informar de todos los accidentes, lesiones y casi accidentes que ocurrieron en su línea
Report all maintenance issues on your line immediately. / Informe de todos los problemas de mantenimiento en su línea de inmediato.

Continuously wipe mispainted pumpkins when machines are down or product is being switched / Limpiar continuamente las calabazas mal pintadas cuando las máquinas estén detenidas o se esté cambiando el producto.
Continuously stock hats and hair for Line 1 / Abastecer continuamente sombreros y cabello para la Línea 1
Begin stocking and organizing all supplies-(boxes, UPCs, slip sheets, pallets) / Comience a abastecer y organizar todos los suministros (cajas, UPCs, hojas deslizantes, pallets)
Empty all Trash cans, and replace all towel baskets / Vaciar todos los botes de basura y reemplazar todas las cestas de toallas.
Put away unused items-sticker guns, UPCs, dirty rags, etc. / Guardar los artículos no utilizados: pistolas de etiquetas, UPCs, trapos sucios, etc.
Begin to grab any cleaning supplies you will need to shut down after close-clean rags / Comience a recoger los suministros de limpieza que necesitará para el cierre: trapos de limpieza.

Organize unusable boxes on a pallet, and ask a forklift driver to move them the proper area / Organice las cajas inservibles en un pallet y pida a un conductor de montacargas que las traslade al área adecuada
Clean all rollers, remove UPC's that have stuck on / Limpiar todos los rodillos, quitar los UPC que se hayan quedado pegados
Clean and Sanitize all contact surface areas / Limpiar y desinfectar todas las áreas de superficies de contacto
Put away all brooms, dust pans and mops- make sure they are hung up off the ground / Guardar todas las escobas, recogedores y trapeadores, asegurándose de que estén colgados y fuera del suelo
After cleaning, gather any rags or cleaning supplies, put them in their designated areas / Después de limpiar, recoge los trapos o suministros de limpieza y colócalos en su área designada.
Employee name of who reported these checks? / ¿Nombre del empleado que reportó estos cheques?

Is there any evidence of human intrusion in the field? / ¿Existe alguna evidencia de intrusión humana en el campo?
Are any materials stored on site clean and orderly? / ¿Hay algún material almacenado en el sitio limpio y ordenado?

Are all field entry restrictions lifted? (i.e., recent pesticides, fertilizer applications) / ¿Se eliminan todas las restricciones de entrada al campo? (es decir, pesticidas recientes, aplicaciones de fertilizantes)
Is there any sign of recent flooding? / ¿Hay alguna señal de inundaciones recientes?
What is the condition of the irrigation source? / ¿Cuál es el estado de la fuente de riego?
Are all employees following proper hygiene protocols? / ¿Están todos los empleados siguiendo los protocolos de higiene adecuados?
Are First Aid & PPE supplies adequately stocked? / ¿Se almacenan adecuadamente los suministros de primeros auxilios y PPE?
Is there adequate drinking water and cups for all employees? / ¿Hay agua potable y vasos adecuados para todos los empleados?
Are employees using tobacco, chewing gum, eating, spitting or wearing jewelry in the growing area? / ¿Los empleados consumen tabaco, mascan chicle, comen, escupen o usan joyas en el área de cultivo?
Is there a restroom on-site adequate for all employees? / ¿Hay un baño en el lugar adecuado para todos los empleados?
Is there adequate water in the tank for handwashing? / ¿Hay suficiente agua en el tanque para lavarse las manos?
Are the restrooms adequately stocked? / ¿Están los baños adecuadamente abastecidos?
Are all trashes lined and properly covered? / ¿Están todos los basureros forrados y cubiertos adecuadamente?
Has the restroom been adequately cleaned and sanitized today? / ¿Se ha limpiado y desinfectado adecuadamente el baño hoy?
Does the restroom need to be serviced and/or repaired? / ¿El baño necesita servicio y / o reparación?

Adequate drainage
Located away from conditions that create or could create offensive odors, noise, traffic, or similar hazards
Grounds free from debris, poisonous plants, uncontrolled weeds or brush
Site provides space for recreation reasonably related to the size of the facility and the type of occupancy
Adequate and convenient water supply that meets standards of the State Health authority
Cold water taps available within 100 feet of each living unit (unless water is provided in the unit)
Adequate drainage facilities for overflow or spillage
Individual drinking cups used
Facilities provided for effective disposal of sewage
Raw or treated liquid waste not allowed to accumulate on the ground surface
Connected to public sewer systems where available; privies or portable toilets provided where public sewers are not available
Provided facilities in compliance with requirements of the State health authority
Housing is structurally sound, in good repair, maintained in sanitary condition, and provides protection against the elements
Floors made of smooth, rigid, cleanable surface and prevent entrance of water
50 sq. ft. or more per person for sleeping purposes in housing with single beds or in family units
40 sq. ft. or more per person for sleeping purposes in housing with double bunk beds
60 sq. ft. or more per person for combined cooking, eating, and sleeping purposes
Housing used by families have separate or partitioned sleeping areas for parents made of rigid materials and installed to provide reasonable privacy, where there are children over 6 years old
Separate sleeping facilities provided for each sex in non- family groups
Separate sleeping facilities provided for each family
Adequate and separate facilities to hang clothes and store personal effects for each person or family
Ceiling height is 7 ft. for more than half of the floor area in each living unit
Each habitable room (not including partitioned areas) has at least one window or skylight opening directly to the outdoors
Window space is 10% or more of usable floor space
Total openable space is at least 45% of the minimum window area required unless other comparable mechanical ventilation is available
Openings in shelter screened with not less than 16-mesh materials
Any screen doors present are in good repair, tight fitting, and equipped with self-closing devices
Operable, properly installed heating equipment in living quarters and service rooms
When the temperature falls below 68°F, heating equipment is capable of maintaining a temperature of 68°F in living quarters or service rooms
Any stoves or other sources of heat utilizing combustible fuel must be installed and vented to prevent fire hazards and a dangerous concentration of gases
Nenhum aquecedor portátil usado além daqueles operados por eletricidade Fogão a combustível sólido ou líquido:
Only used in a room with proper insulation or fireproofing on walls, and ceiling within at least 18” of stove
Heating pipes of fireproof material; stovepipes have vented metal collars installed through openings
Any automatic controls cut off the fuel supply upon the failure or interruption of the flame or ignition, or whenever a predetermined safe temperature or pressure is exceeded
Electricity provided with all wiring and lighting fixtures in safe condition
Adequate ceiling or wall-type light fixtures in all rooms
At least one electrical outlet provided in each living room
Adequate lighting for yard and pathways to common-use facilities
Toilets constructed, located, and maintained in a manner to prevent nuisance or public health hazard
Water closets or privy or outhouse seats for each sex provided in a ratio of at least 1 unit for each 15 occupants
Common use facilities have a minimum of 1 water closet or privy seat for each sex
Urinals constructed of non-absorbent materials
Urinals substituted for men’s toilets in the proper ratio of 1 urinal or 24 inches of trough-type urinal for 1 toilet seat up to a maximum of 1/3 of the required toilet seats, when applicable
Separate toilet facilities provided for each sex (except in family units)
Toilets facilities for each sex in the same building separated by a solid wall from wall to ceiling/roof
Toilets marked “men” and “women” and in native language of occupants
Adequate and accessible supply of toilet tissue (with holders) provided in common-use toilet facilities
Common use toilets and privies or outhouses well-lighted, ventilated, clean, and sanitary
Toilet facilities located not more than 200 ft. from living units
Privies or outhouses located at least 50 ft. from living, cooking, or dining areas
Privy or outhouse structures and pits are fly-tight and have adequate capacity for the required seats
Hot and cold water under pressure provided for bathing and hand-washing
Bathing and hand-washing facilities in sanitary condition
Bathing and hand-washing facilities located within 200 ft. of each living unit
Showerheads provided at a ratio of 1 per every 15 persons and not less than 3’ apart
Shower area includes at least 9 sq. ft. of floor space per unit
Adequate, dry dressing space in common-use facilities
Shower floors constructed of nonabsorbent, nonskid materials with proper drains
Separate shower facilities provided for each sex (except in family units)
Shower facilities for each sex in the same building separated by a solid wall from wall to ceiling/roof
Shower facilities for each sex in the same building marked “men” and “women” and in native language of occupants
Lavatories/wash basins provided in a ratio of at least 1 per every 15 persons
Laundry facilities with hot and cold water under pressure
Laundry trays or tubs provided in the ratio of at least 1 per 25 persons (or washing machines in the ratio of 1 per 50 persons plus 1 laundry tray per 100 persons)
Space or equipment provided for cooking and eating
Cookstove or hot plate with at least two burners provided
Adequate food storage shelves and counter for food preparation
Provisions for mechanical refrigeration at 45°F or less
Table and chairs or equivalent seating and eating arrangements proportional to capacity of the unit
Adequate lighting and ventilation
Common facility, room, or building separate from sleeping facilities for cooking and eating
Stoves or hot plates with at least 2 burners provided in ratio of 1 to 10 persons, or 1 to 2 families
Adequate food storage shelves and counter for food preparation
Provisions for mechanical refrigeration at 45°F or less
Adequate tables and chairs or equivalent seating
Adequate sinks with hot and cold water under pressure

Use this checklist to evaluate operator safety prior to equipment use. / Utilice esta lista de verificación para evaluar la seguridad del operador antes de usar el equipo.
sample_fields.answer: Operator Being Evaluated: / Operador en evaluación: Jorge Pacheco

sample_fields.question: Did the operator follow the daily checklist and inspect the equipment prior to use? / ¿El operador siguió la lista de verificación diaria e inspeccionó el equipo antes de usarlo?
Did the operator fasten their seatbelt properly prior to usage? / ¿El operador se abrochó el cinturón de seguridad correctamente antes de usarlo?
Traveling with forks in a safe position (do not raise/lower while in motion) / Viajar con las horquillas en una posición segura (no subir ni bajar en movimiento)
Operating at a safe speed / Operando a una velocidad segura
Observing all traffic rules, warning signs and overhead clearances / Observar todas las reglas de tráfico, señales de advertencia y espacios libres elevados
Using the horn to alert others when cornering, reversing, etc. / Usar la bocina para alertar a los demás al tomar curvas, dar marcha atrás, etc.
Maintaining personal safety (keep arms/legs within the equipment) / Mantener la seguridad personal (mantener brazos / piernas dentro del equipo)
Slowing down, stopping in a smooth and controlled manner / Disminuir la velocidad, detenerse de manera suave y controlada

Parking in a safe manner (lowered forks, parking brake, ignition off, authorized area) / Estacionarse de manera segura (horquillas bajadas, freno de estacionamiento, encendido apagado, área autorizada)
Ensure all employees are clear from the area / Asegúrese de que todos los empleados estén alejados del área
Square up with the load prior to lifting / Encuadre con la carga antes de levantar
Safely make contact with the load and smoothly lift / Haga contacto de forma segura con la carga y levante suavemente
Tilting the mast to stabilize the load prior to transport / Inclinación del mástil para estabilizar la carga antes del transporte
Traveling with the load at an appropriate height / Viajar con la carga a una altura adecuada
Ensuring proper clearance and space for load placement / Garantizar la holgura y el espacio adecuados para la colocación de la carga
Square up to the location prior to placement / Cuadre con la ubicación antes de la colocación
Smoothly placing the load and safely make contact with surface / Colocar suavemente la carga y hacer contacto seguro con la superficie
Safely backing away from the placed load / Retroceder con seguridad de la carga colocada
Ensuring employee safety while picking/transporting loads / Garantizar la seguridad de los empleados al recoger / transportar cargas
Wearing proper PPE while fueling / Usar el PPE adecuado mientras reposta
Equipment safely parked and engine off / Equipo estacionado de forma segura y motor apagado
Follows all trained procedures and operates safely while fueling / Sigue todos los procedimientos capacitados y opera de manera segura mientras reposta
Cleans up any spills/messes immediately / Limpia cualquier derrame / desorden inmediatamente
